item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-09 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2287 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2287，前 3 日均值 1120.3，加速度 2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] TencentCloud/CubeSandbox (+499 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +499，总 stars 9,035，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+1149 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1149，总 stars 50,909，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI (+2017 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2017，总 stars 12,281，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] alibaba/zvec (+989 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +989，总 stars 14,498，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+601 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +601，总 stars 53,381，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+636 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +636，总 stars 35,780，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1247 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1247，总 stars 54,421，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] HKUDS/nanobot (+48 stars/24h)

item.title: [sustained_hot] getagentseal/codeburn (+39 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Free, local tool to track AI coding token usage and cost across 31 tools and agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini and more), by model, project, and task. npx codeburn Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向一周增长 +168，属于持续升温信号。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
